RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUNCAN, ELISA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-29-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNCAN, ELISA $20,825.25 PRINCIPAL, $2,793.00 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,048.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
